verdict: Replaying each day's observed DIPCEF solar energy on the flat clear-sky shape collapses the Luzon price correlation (0.353 to 0.067 vs MCP) while barely moving MAE; the shipped backcast keeps the clear-sky credit.
note: The observed DAILY energy without the observed hourly shape cannot be a replay input: dumping it onto the flat midday shape crushes daytime prices below what cleared. The missing piece is a per-resource hourly solar series.
disclaimer: Statistical indicators derived from public data. Patterns may have legitimate explanations.
